scripts.test: E2E_PORT_ACTION=${E2E_PORT_ACTION:-kill} BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 SKIP_WEBSERVER=0 E2E_USE_DEV_RUNTIME=${E2E_USE_DEV_RUNTIME:-0} E2E_COMPOSE_MODE=${E2E_COMPOSE_MODE:-ci} PW_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=${PW_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER:-1} bash ../scripts/e2e-run-with-lock.sh playwright test

scripts.test:ui: BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 SKIP_WEBSERVER=0 E2E_USE_DEV_RUNTIME=${E2E_USE_DEV_RUNTIME:-0} E2E_COMPOSE_MODE=${E2E_COMPOSE_MODE:-ci} PW_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=${PW_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER:-1} playwright test --ui
scripts.test:smoke: E2E_RUNNER_ACTION=${E2E_RUNNER_ACTION:-kill} E2E_PORT_ACTION=${E2E_PORT_ACTION:-kill} BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 SKIP_WEBSERVER=0 E2E_USE_DEV_RUNTIME=${E2E_USE_DEV_RUNTIME:-0} E2E_COMPOSE_MODE=${E2E_COMPOSE_MODE:-ci} PW_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=${PW_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER:-0} bash ../scripts/e2e-run-with-lock.sh playwright test --project=chromium tests/smoke-public.spec.ts
scripts.test:ci:mobile: E2E_PORT_ACTION=${E2E_PORT_ACTION:-kill} BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 CI=1 SKIP_WEBSERVER=0 E2E_USE_DEV_RUNTIME=${E2E_USE_DEV_RUNTIME:-0} E2E_COMPOSE_MODE=${E2E_COMPOSE_MODE:-ci} PW_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=${PW_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER:-1} bash ../scripts/e2e-run-with-lock.sh ./node_modules/.bin/playwright test --project="Mobile Chrome" tests/ux-regression.spec.ts --grep "mobile navigation drawer keeps the compact section layout|mobile auth entry routes keep forms above the fold|mobile staff routes use compact cards and avoid horizontal overflow"
scripts.test:ci: E2E_PORT_ACTION=${E2E_PORT_ACTION:-kill} BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 API_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3001 CI=1 SKIP_WEBSERVER=0 E2E_USE_DEV_RUNTIME=${E2E_USE_DEV_RUNTIME:-0} E2E_COMPOSE_MODE=${E2E_COMPOSE_MODE:-ci} PW_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=${PW_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER:-1} bash ../scripts/e2e-run-with-lock.sh playwright test --project=chromium --project=firefox --project=webkit && npm run test:ci:mobile
